title: User
description: A Google Workspace user account. JSON representation of a user resource from the Admin SDK Directory API.

kind.description: The type of the API resource.

id.description: The unique ID for the user.

primaryEmail.description: The user primary email address. This property is required in a request to create a user account. The primaryEmail must be unique and cannot be an alias of another user.

isAdmin.description: Indicates a user with super administrator privileges. The isAdmin property can only be edited using the makeAdmin method; it is not directly editable in the user resource.

isDelegatedAdmin.description: Indicates if the user is a delegated administrator.

lastLoginTime.description: The last time the user logged into the user account. The value is in ISO 8601 date and time format.

creationTime.description: The time the user account was created. The value is in ISO 8601 date and time format.

deletionTime.description: The time the user account was deleted (for deleted users).

agreedToTerms.description: Indicates whether the user has completed an initial login and accepted the Terms of Service.

password.description: Stores the password for the user account. The password value is never returned in the API response body. Required when creating a user account. Must be 8-100 ASCII characters.

hashFunction.description: Stores the hash format of the password property. Use MD5, SHA-1, or crypt for supported hash formats.

suspended.description: Indicates if the user is suspended. A suspended user cannot sign in.

suspensionReason.description: The reason a user account is suspended. Only returned when the suspended property is true.

changePasswordAtNextLogin.description: Indicates if the user is forced to change their password at next login.

ipWhitelisted.description: If true, the user IP address is subject to a deprecated IP address allowlist configuration.

customerId.description: The customer ID to retrieve all account users. You can use the alias my_customer to represent the account customerId.

orgUnitPath.description: The full path of the parent organization associated with the user. If the parent organization is the top-level, it is represented as a forward slash (/).

isMailboxSetup.description: Indicates if the user Gmail mailbox has been created.

includeInGlobalAddressList.description: Indicates if the user profile is visible in the Google Workspace global address list.

thumbnailPhotoUrl.description: Photo URL of the user. The URL might be temporary or private. Read-only.

archived.description: Indicates if the user is archived.

recoveryPhone.description: Recovery phone of the user in E.164 format.

emails.description: A list of the user email addresses. The maximum allowed data size is 10KB.

phones.description: A list of the user phone numbers.

addresses.description: A list of the user addresses.

organizations.description: A list of organizations the user belongs to.

relations.description: A list of the user relationships to other users.

externalIds.description: A list of external IDs for the user.

websites.description: A list of the user websites.

customSchemas.description: Custom fields of the user. Keys are schema names and values are objects with field name/value pairs.
